nodes.label: Z-Gate Collision Pattern
nodes.rationale: Prevents Hoppers from colliding with ground entities while visually airborne by checking Z-axis.

nodes.label: Asexual Reproduction Mechanism
nodes.rationale: When a creature is well-fed, off cooldown, and world is below cap, probabilistically spawns a baby (clone) to prevent ecosystem death.

nodes.label: Zero-Cost Crop Export
nodes.rationale: Dynamic bounding box tracking allows for zero-cost cropping of the drawing canvas when exporting, skipping full-canvas scans.

nodes.label: HTMLImageElement Caching Strategy
nodes.rationale: Prevents GC pauses and dropped frames by pre-building HTMLImageElement per creature instead of creating `new Image()` on every frame.

nodes.label: Command Bus Pattern
nodes.rationale: Separates UI state from simulation state. The store handles user actions and bridges to the game loop without directly mutating the simulation, maintaining 60fps performance.
